com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.crypto

Class AlgorithmParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.crypto.AlgorithmParameters

  • public class AlgorithmParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    Algorithm parameters used for symmetric key generation or data encryption/decryption.

      Gets cipher mode.

        public AlgorithmParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • getPaddingMode

        public PaddingMode getPaddingMode()
        Gets padding mode.
        Returns:
        Padding mode, see PaddingMode.

      • setPaddingMode

        public void setPaddingMode(PaddingMode paddingMode)
        Sets Padding mode.
        Parameters:
        paddingMode - Padding mode, see PaddingMode

      • getCipherMode

        public CipherMode getCipherMode()
        Gets cipher mode.
        Returns:
        Cipher mode, see CipherMode.

      • setCipherMode

        public void setCipherMode(CipherMode cipherMode)
        Sets cipher mode.
        Parameters:
        cipherMode - Cipher mode, see CipherMode.

      • getIV

        public byte[] getIV()
        Gets initial value.
        Returns:
        Initial value, required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC.

      • setIV

        public void setIV(byte[] iv)
        Sets initial value.
        Parameters:
        iv - Initial value, required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC.
